infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CLC Premiere Studios needs camera access for live streaming and face cam recording.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CLC Premiere Studios needs microphone access for audio recording and AI music creation.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CLC Premiere Studios needs photo library access to save and import media.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: CLC Premiere Studios needs permission to save recordings to your photo library.
